query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(createdAt) as earliest, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM sms_messages GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(createdAt) as earliest, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM sms_messages GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC
